---
title: "Swimmer's Data Report"
format: html
engine: python
---
```{python}
#| echo: false
import datetime

report_date = datetime.datetime.now().strftime("%A, %d %B %Y")
```

### Report Generated: `{python} report_date`

```{python}
#| echo: false
filename = "Hannah-13-100m-Back.txt"
folder = "../../swimdata/"
filepath = folder + filename

with open(filepath) as file:
    lines = file.readlines()

name, age, distance, stroke = filename.replace(".txt", "").split("-")
```

**Name (Age):** `{python} name` (`{python} age`)<br/>
**Distance:** `{python} distance`<br/>
**Stroke:** `{python} stroke`<br/>


```{python}
#| echo: false
import pandas as pd

times = lines[0].strip().split(",")

converted_times = []
for time in times:
    minutes, rest = time.split(":")
    seconds, hundreths = rest.split(".")
    converted = (int(minutes) * 60 * 100) + (int(seconds) * 100) + int((hundreths))
    converted_times.append(converted)

rows = []
attempts = []
for i, time in enumerate(times, 1):
    attempts.append(i)
    rows.append({"Attempt": i, "Time": time, "Converted": converted_times[i-1]})
df = pd.DataFrame(rows)
df.index = [""] * len(df) # hide the default index
df
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plot_df = pd.DataFrame({
    "Attempt": attempts,
    "Converted": converted_times,
    "Time_str": times
})

plt.figure(figsize=(6, 4))
plt.bar(range(1, len(converted_times)+1), converted_times, color="skyblue")

# Add original mm:ss.ss as labels above bars
for i, (sec, tstr) in enumerate(zip(converted_times, times), 1):
    plt.text(i, sec + 0.2, tstr, ha='center', va='bottom')

plt.xlabel("Attempt")
plt.ylabel("Time (cs)")
plt.title("Swimmer Times")
plt.xticks(range(1, len(converted_times)+1))
plt.show()
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
average_time_cs = sum(converted_times) / len(converted_times)
minutes = int(average_time_cs // 6000)
seconds = int((average_time_cs % 6000) // 100)
hundredths = int(average_time_cs % 100)
average_time_str = f"{minutes}:{seconds:02}.{hundredths:02}"
```

**Average Time:** `{python} average_time_str`<br/>
